parameters.content:
## Insurance Quote Intake AI Router

### How it works

This workflow receives an insurance quote form submission, normalizes it, checks existing Airtable and/or Google Sheets logs for duplicates, and then uses OpenAI to pre-qualify new leads. It routes hot and warm leads to Teams, Slack, and optionally Twilio SMS alerts, while cold leads go straight to logging. Finally, it writes the quote outcome to the configured log destinations and prepares a final response.

### Setup steps

- Configure the webhook trigger URL in the quote form or website that submits requests.
- Edit the Setup Quote Configuration code node with business settings, routing flags, log destination IDs, alert toggles, phone numbers, and webhook URLs.
- Connect OpenAI credentials and confirm the prompt/model settings match the desired quote pre-qualification criteria.
- Connect Airtable and Google Sheets credentials if either lookup or write logging path is enabled, and verify base/table/sheet column names match the code mappings.
- Configure Microsoft Teams incoming webhook, Slack credentials/channel, and Twilio credentials if those alert channels are enabled.

### Customization

Adjust the OpenAI qualification prompt, priority thresholds, duplicate-matching rules, alert message templates, and which channels or log destinations are enabled for different lead priorities.

## Receive quote submission

Webhook entry point that receives the incoming insurance quote form payload.

## Configure and normalize

Loads editable workflow settings and standardizes the submitted quote request into the structure used downstream.

## Airtable lookup branch

Conditionally reads prior quote records from Airtable, or builds an equivalent skip bundle when Airtable lookup is disabled.

## Sheets and AI hub

A shared mid-canvas cluster that handles optional Google Sheets lookup/pass-through rows and also contains the later OpenAI pre-qualification, parsing, and priority switch for new quotes.

## Duplicate and route outputs

Verifies whether the quote is new, gates processing for new submissions, and begins the spatially nearby hot/warm alert path or cold lead log path.

## Teams alert path

Posts a prepared alert to Microsoft Teams when enabled, confirms delivery, or marks the Teams alert as skipped.

## Slack alert decision

Checks whether the workflow should continue by sending a Slack alert after the Teams branch completes or is skipped.

## Slack alert path

Sends the Slack alert when enabled, records the send confirmation, or marks the Slack alert as skipped.

## SMS need decision

Determines whether a hot lead requires an immediate SMS alert after team channel notifications finish.

## SMS delivery path

Prepares and sends a Twilio SMS for hot leads, confirms delivery, or marks that no SMS was needed.

## Build log record

Combines the lead analysis, alert outcomes, and quote details into a normalized record for persistence.

## Airtable write branch

Conditionally creates the final quote record in Airtable, confirms the write, or passes along a skipped-write marker.

## Sheets write branch

Conditionally appends the final quote record to Google Sheets, confirms the write, or marks the Sheets write as skipped.

## Finalize quote response

Produces the final workflow response after the logging branches have completed or been skipped.

parameters.jsCode:
const quote = $('Normalize Quote Data').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...quote, _lookupRows: [] } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: item }];

values.content: You are an insurance agency intake assistant for commercial and personal lines. Return ONLY valid JSON with keys: leadScore (0-100 integer), priority (hot|warm|cold), coverageSummary (string), recommendedProducts (array of strings), underwritingFlags (array of strings), missingInfo (array of strings), nextStep (string), talkingPoints (array of strings). Score higher when coverage is needed soon, revenue/employee count fit target market, contact info is complete, and claims history is favorable. Score lower for incomplete data, high-risk industries without controls, frequent claims, or vague requests. Flag red flags like lapse in coverage, DUI, unfilled roof age, or contractor without GL.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ '@type': 'MessageCard', '@context': 'http://schema.org/extensions', themeColor: $json.route === 'hot' ? 'D13438' : '0078D4', summary: 'Insurance quote lead', sections: [{ activityTitle: $json.route === 'hot' ? 'Hot insurance quote lead' : 'New insurance quote request', facts: [ { name: 'Lead score', value: String($json.leadScore) + '/100' }, { name: 'Contact', value: ($json.fullName || 'Unknown') + ' — ' + ($json.phone || 'no phone') }, { name: 'Business', value: $json.businessName || 'Not provided' }, { name: 'Coverage', value: $json.coverageType || 'Not specified' }, { name: 'Flags', value: $json.underwritingFlags || 'None' } ], text: $json.teamsMessage } ] }) }}

return [{ json: { ...item, teamsSent: 'yes' } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, teamsSent: 'no' } }];

nodes.name: Check SMS Requirement for Hot Lead

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, smsSent: 'yes' } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, smsSent: 'no' } }];

const item = $input.first().json;

return [
  {
    json: {
      quoteLog: item.quoteLog,
      useAirtableLog: item.useAirtableLog,
      useSheetsLog: item.useSheetsLog,
      airtableBaseId: item.airtableBaseId,
      quotesTableName: item.quotesTableName,
      googleSheetId: item.googleSheetId,
      sheetsTabName: item.sheetsTabName,
      'Received At': item.receivedAt,
      'Submission ID': item.submissionId,
      'Quote Hash': item.quoteHash,
      'Full Name': item.fullName,
      'Business Name': item.businessName,
      Email: item.email,
      Phone: item.phone,
      'Coverage Type': item.coverageType,
      Industry: item.industry,
      'Annual Revenue': item.annualRevenue,
      Employees: item.employeeCount,
      'Claims History': item.claimsHistory,
      'Effective Date': item.effectiveDate,
      Source: item.source,
      'Lead Score': item.leadScore,
      Priority: item.route,
      'Coverage Summary': item.coverageSummary,
      'Recommended Products': item.recommendedProducts,
      'Underwriting Flags': item.underwritingFlags,
      'Missing Info': item.missingInfo,
      'Next Step': item.nextStep,
      'Talking Points': item.talkingPoints,
      Notes: item.notes,
      'Teams Sent': item.teamsSent || 'no',
      'Slack Sent': item.slackSent || 'no',
      'SMS Sent': item.smsSent || 'no',
      Status: item.route === 'hot' ? 'Hot - Contact Now' : item.route === 'warm' ? 'Warm - Follow Up' : 'Cold - Nurture',
      _testScenario: item._testScenario || '',
    },
  },
];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, airtableLogged: 'no' } }];

const prior = $('Check Sheets Write Requirement').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...prior, sheetsLogged: 'yes', sheetsMocked: false, sheetsRowId: `sheetLocal${Date.now()}` } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, sheetsLogged: 'no' } }];

const item = $input.first().json;

return [
  {
    json: {
      status: 'ok',
      quoteLog: item.quoteLog,
      airtableLogged: item.airtableLogged || 'no',
      sheetsLogged: item.sheetsLogged || 'no',
      airtableMocked: Boolean(item.airtableMocked),
      sheetsMocked: Boolean(item.sheetsMocked),
      id: item.airtableRecordId || item.sheetsRowId || `local-${Date.now()}`,
      fields: {
        'Received At': item['Received At'],
        'Submission ID': item['Submission ID'],
        'Quote Hash': item['Quote Hash'],
        'Full Name': item['Full Name'],
        'Business Name': item['Business Name'],
        Email: item.Email,
        Phone: item.Phone,
        'Coverage Type': item['Coverage Type'],
        Industry: item.Industry,
        'Annual Revenue': item['Annual Revenue'],
        Employees: item.Employees,
        'Claims History': item['Claims History'],
        'Effective Date': item['Effective Date'],
        Source: item.Source,
        'Lead Score': item['Lead Score'],
        Priority: item.Priority,
        'Coverage Summary': item['Coverage Summary'],
        'Recommended Products': item['Recommended Products'],
        'Underwriting Flags': item['Underwriting Flags'],
        'Missing Info': item['Missing Info'],
        'Next Step': item['Next Step'],
        'Talking Points': item['Talking Points'],
        Notes: item.Notes,
        'Teams Sent': item['Teams Sent'],
        'Slack Sent': item['Slack Sent'],
        'SMS Sent': item['SMS Sent'],
        Status: item.Status,
      },
      route: item.Priority,
      leadScore: item['Lead Score'],
      teamsSent: item['Teams Sent'],
      slackSent: item['Slack Sent'],
      smsSent: item['SMS Sent'],
      testScenario: item._testScenario || '',
    },
  },
];
